locked_constraints.inside_vessel: zirconia 3D package + 3x LCC02046 carriers + Hall sensor dies (hot, UHV, plasma side)
locked_constraints.outside_vessel: hsx_2026_v2 readout board(s), ambient, air side
locked_constraints.in_vessel_components: zirconia 3D package + LCC02046 carriers + sensor dies only

open_bench_anomaly: measured output ~109x below prediction; DV gain check pending; do not trust measured amplitudes
decision_gates_open: GATE 1 - board architecture: approve Option C (replicate x3, side-by-side rack)

GATE 2 (REVISED 2026-07-10) - feedthrough PO ~$1,145: 19C-275 (110210, single-shell MIL-C-26482, 2.75in CF) primary after (a) UW confirms 2.75in CF port, (b) Accu-Glass confirms 19C-275 contact AWG + single-shell protrusion fits envelope; fallback 9C2-275 (~$1,572) if (b) fails, then 15D-450/25D-450 if port changes to 4.5in

GATE 3 - Concept B geometry freeze + ceramics PO after RT-16/17/18 fixes; bond-blocking sub-gate: LCC numbering + die orientation (RT-02). NOTE: RT-16 height ledger (8.2mm standoff) was computed against the now-superseded dual-tower 9C2-275 and needs recompute for the 19C-275 single shell before freeze.
post_run_updates: 2026-07-10 - user asked about Accu-Glass 19C-275 (MIL-C-26482, 19-pin, 2.75in CF, $434). Verified feasible and superior to prior GATE 2 pick (9C2-275): cheaper, one more spare pin, single shell removes A/B mis-mate risk entirely. Promoted to primary in FLANGE_SELECTION.md/DECISION_GATES.md/MASTER_STATE.json. OPEN RECONCILIATION DEBT: WIRING_PLAN.md (ST6 pin grouping + A/B swap FMEA) and PACKAGING_3D_DESIGN.md (ST8 height ledger/standoff) were built for the 9C2-275 dual-tower geometry and have NOT been rerun for the 19C-275 single shell.
next_action: USER: sign off the 3 gates in 90_SYNTHESIS/DECISION_GATES.md; send UW email + Accu-Glass call (now also covering 19C-275 contact AWG + protrusion height); close DV gain anomaly on bench; reconcile WIRING_PLAN.md/PACKAGING_3D_DESIGN.md to the 19C-275 single-shell geometry before freezing GATE 3
redteam_wave1: complete: 0 BLOCKER, 2 MAJOR (RT-01 envelope-vs-towers gate; RT-02 LCC numbering + die orientation gates), 9 MINOR, 4 NOTE; pin-map chain consistent; carry ST4 400 pF threshold
redteam_wave2: complete: 0 BLOCKER, 3 MAJOR (RT-16 height ledger/tower gate; RT-17 preload tolerance chain; RT-18 rotation key), 5 MINOR, 4 NOTE; Concept B survives weakened
